ddls:
CREATE TABLE "incidents" (
  "incident_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each incident */,
  "police_station_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the police station where the incident was reported */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the incident occurred */,
  "crime_category_id" INTEGER /* Category of the crime (e.g., Theft and Handling, Robbery) */,
  "incident_type_id" INTEGER /* Type of incident (e.g., Theft/Taking of Pedal Cycle, Motor Vehicle Interference & Tampering) */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Location of the incident */,
  "reporting_officer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the officer who reported the incident */,
  "incident_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the incident */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the incident (e.g., open, in progress, closed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("incident_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_incidents_reporting_officer_id FOREIGN KEY ("reporting_officer_id") REFERENCES officers ("officer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_incidents_police_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("police_station_id") REFERENCES police_stations ("police_station_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_incidents_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_incidents_incident_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("incident_type_id") REFERENCES incident_types ("incident_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_incidents_crime_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("crime_category_id") REFERENCES crime_categories ("crime_category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "police_stations" (
  "police_station_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each police station */,
  "police_station_name" TEXT /* Name of the police station */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the police station */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the police station */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the police station */,
  "division_id" INTEGER /* ID of the division the police station belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("police_station_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_police_stations_division_id FOREIGN KEY ("division_id") REFERENCES divisions ("division_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "crime_categories" (
  "crime_category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each crime category */,
  "crime_category_name" TEXT /* Name of the crime category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the crime category */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent category (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("crime_category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "incident_types" (
  "incident_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each incident type */,
  "incident_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the incident type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the incident type */,
  "crime_category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the crime category it belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("incident_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_incident_types_crime_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("crime_category_id") REFERENCES crime_categories ("crime_category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "incident_id" INTEGER /* ID of the incident that occurred at this location */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the location */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the location */,
  "location_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the location type (e.g., residential, commercial) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_locations_incident_id FOREIGN KEY ("incident_id") REFERENCES incidents ("incident_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_locations_location_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_type_id") REFERENCES location_types ("location_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "location_types" (
  "location_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location type */,
  "location_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the location type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the location type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "officers" (
  "officer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each officer */,
  "incident_id" INTEGER /* ID of the incident the officer is involved in */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the officer */,
  "badge_number" TEXT /* Badge number of the officer */,
  "rank" TEXT /* Rank of the officer */,
  "division_id" INTEGER /* ID of the division the officer belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("officer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_officers_division_id FOREIGN KEY ("division_id") REFERENCES divisions ("division_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "divisions" (
  "division_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each division */,
  "division_name" TEXT /* Name of the division */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the division */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("division_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "incident_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "incident_id" INTEGER /* ID of the incident the report is for */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "report_details" TEXT /* Details of the report */,
  "report_status" TEXT /* Status of the report (e.g., pending, approved, rejected) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_incident_reports_incident_id FOREIGN KEY ("incident_id") REFERENCES incidents ("incident_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "crime_statistics" (
  "statistic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each statistic */,
  "crime_category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the crime category */,
  "incident_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the incident type */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the statistic is for */,
  "count" INTEGER /* Count of incidents for the given crime category and type */,
  "division_id" INTEGER /* ID of the division the statistic is for */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("statistic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_crime_statistics_division_id FOREIGN KEY ("division_id") REFERENCES divisions ("division_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_crime_statistics_incident_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("incident_type_id") REFERENCES incident_types ("incident_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_crime_statistics_crime_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("crime_category_id") REFERENCES crime_categories ("crime_category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., police officer, administrator) */,
  "division_id" INTEGER /* ID of the division the user belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_division_id FOREIGN KEY ("division_id") REFERENCES divisions ("division_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "incident_categories" (
  "incident_category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each incident category */,
  "incident_category_name" TEXT /* Name of the incident category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the incident category */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent category (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("incident_category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_incident_categories_parent_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_category_id") REFERENCES incident_categories ("incident_category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "incident_subcategories" (
  "incident_subcategory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each incident subcategory */,
  "incident_category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the incident category */,
  "incident_subcategory_name" TEXT /* Name of the incident subcategory */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the incident subcategory */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("incident_subcategory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_incident_subcategories_incident_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("incident_category_id") REFERENCES incident_categories ("incident_category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "incident_locations" (
  "incident_location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each incident location */,
  "incident_id" INTEGER /* ID of the incident */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("incident_location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_incident_locations_incident_id FOREIGN KEY ("incident_id") REFERENCES incidents ("incident_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_incident_locations_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "incident_officers" (
  "incident_officer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each incident officer */,
  "incident_id" INTEGER /* ID of the incident */,
  "officer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the officer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("incident_officer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_incident_officers_officer_id FOREIGN KEY ("officer_id") REFERENCES officers ("officer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_incident_officers_incident_id FOREIGN KEY ("incident_id") REFERENCES incidents ("incident_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "incident_suspects" (
  "incident_suspect_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each incident suspect */,
  "incident_id" INTEGER /* ID of the incident */,
  "suspect_id" INTEGER /* ID of the suspect */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("incident_suspect_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_incident_suspects_incident_id FOREIGN KEY ("incident_id") REFERENCES incidents ("incident_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_incident_suspects_suspect_id FOREIGN KEY ("suspect_id") REFERENCES suspects ("suspect_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "incident_victims" (
  "incident_victim_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each incident victim */,
  "incident_id" INTEGER /* ID of the incident */,
  "victim_id" INTEGER /* ID of the victim */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("incident_victim_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_incident_victims_incident_id FOREIGN KEY ("incident_id") REFERENCES incidents ("incident_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_incident_victims_victim_id FOREIGN KEY ("victim_id") REFERENCES victims ("victim_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "suspects" (
  "suspect_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each suspect */,
  "incident_id" INTEGER /* ID of the incident the suspect is involved in */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the suspect */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the suspect */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the suspect */,
  " occupation" TEXT /* Occupation of the suspect */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("suspect_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "victims" (
  "victim_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each victim */,
  "incident_id" INTEGER /* ID of the incident the victim is involved in */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the victim */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the victim */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the victim */,
  "occupation" TEXT /* Occupation of the victim */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("victim_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "evidence" (
  "evidence_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each evidence */,
  "incident_id" INTEGER /* ID of the incident the evidence is for */,
  "evidence_type_id" INTEGER /* Type of evidence (e.g., physical, digital) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the evidence */,
  "collected_by_officer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the officer who collected the evidence */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("evidence_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_evidence_incident_id FOREIGN KEY ("incident_id") REFERENCES incidents ("incident_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_evidence_evidence_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("evidence_type_id") REFERENCES evidence_types ("evidence_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_evidence_collected_by_officer_id FOREIGN KEY ("collected_by_officer_id") REFERENCES officers ("officer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "evidence_types" (
  "evidence_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each evidence type */,
  "evidence_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the evidence type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the evidence type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("evidence_type_id")
)
